query:
SELECT 
  p.id, p.projectName, p.priority, p.sector, p.state, p.stageCode,
  p.estimatedValue, p.lane,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS srCount,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.name END) AS topContact,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.title END) AS topTitle,
  MIN(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN c.company END) AS topCompany,
  DATE(p.createdAt) AS addedDate
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project LIKE CONCAT('%', SUBSTRING(p.projectName, 1, 30), '%')
  OR p.projectName LIKE CONCAT('%', SUBSTRING(c.project, 1, 30), '%')
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.lane IS NULL OR p.lane NOT IN ('bess', 'pal', 'pumps'))
  AND (p.state = 'WA' OR p.state = 'NATIONAL' OR p.state IS NULL)
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING srCount >= 1
ORDER BY 
  CASE p.priority WHEN 'hot' THEN 1 WHEN 'warm' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
  srCount DESC,
  p.estimatedValue DESC
LIMIT 10;

LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project LIKE CONCAT('%', SUBSTRING(p.projectName, 1, 30), '%')

HAVING srCount >= 1

  srCount DESC,
  p.estimatedValue DESC
LIMIT 10;
